evidence.surface: Market detail — candlestick chart Y-axis labels (PUMP)

evidence.after_caption: Post-fix: Y-axis labels render real 6-decimal prices (0.001802, 0.001800, 0.001790, 0.001780)

evidence.surface: Market detail — OrderCard trigger price (PUMP TP/SL row)
evidence.before_caption: TAT-3009 bug: trigger price on PUMP orders shows <$0.01
evidence.after_caption: Post-fix: trigger price renders $0.0016 via formatPerpsFiatUniversal
